Description: Address
Unique identifier for each address.
The date that the case was closed.
The date that the case was created.

The unique identifier of an L&I case.  L&I cases are typically created upon response to a public complaint.  The generation of an L&I case is not meant to indicate there are or were code violations found, just that an investigation was or will be conducted. The case can either be against a property due to suspected building or property violation, or against a business/license holder due to suspected breach of license contract.  L&I will issue subsequent violations on a case upon the discovery of active code violations.
Priority type of the case.
Used to assign which unit is responsible for the case going forward.
Status of the case, which is different than the status of individual related violations.
Type of case.
Census tract of the address.
City Council District.
Date of the most recent investigation on the case.

Office of Property Assessment Account Number' Every land parcel within the City of Philadelphia is assigned a unique account number from OPA. This number stays with the property for as long as the deed is held by the same owner. Once a property transfers ownership, it is assigned a new OPA account number and the old one is retired.

This field can be used as a join key for various city datasets. It is also sometimes known as the 'BRT' number or within some datasets coming directly from OPA is also called the 'PARCEL_NUMBER'. (Other departments may use different internal 'Parcel Numbers', so please verify before using).
Office of Property Assessment's ownership from the current deed for the property.
Unique identifier for each parcel assigned by Philadelphia Water Department.
Objectid and join field for related records.

URL hosting the public Notice of Violation document when one is available. For violations issued prior to July 1, 2024, please visit https://www.phila.gov/services/permits-violations-licenses/get-a-copy-of-a-license-permit-or-violation/ to get a notice of violation report.
The L&I system where this record originates. Possible values: HANSEN (1/1/2007-3/13/2020), ECLIPSE (3/16/2020-present).
